description: Register a BigQueryPandasIOManager so assets are automatically stored in and loaded from BigQuery

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Dagster resource key for this IO manager. Use 'io_manager' to make it the default.

dataset.label: Dataset
dataset.description: BigQuery dataset to store assets in

gcp_credentials_env_var.label: GCP Credentials Env Var
gcp_credentials_env_var.description: Environment variable holding a JSON service account key (optional; uses ADC if not set)

temporary_gcs_bucket.label: Temporary GCS Bucket
temporary_gcs_bucket.description: GCS bucket for temporary files during load jobs

name: BigQuery IO Manager
